variants.name: 灵魂宝石
variants.ability: 每局游戏限一次，在夜晚时*，你可以选择一名玩家：如果你选中了恶魔，他醉酒直到下个黎明。
variants.otherNightReminder: The holder of the Soul Stone shows a 'No' or points to a player. If that player is the Demon, mark them '醉酒'.
variants.flavor: Soul holds a special place among the Infinity Stones. You might say it has a certain wisdom.
